overview: Imperidome is a production-grade full-stack SaaS platform for business and client management, deployed on the Internet Computer. It features a robust Admin Panel (24+ tabs), a comprehensive Client Portal (14 tabs), and a dynamic public-facing website. Now with a full Site Analytics page tracking live visitors, daily trends, page breakdowns, and geography.
features: Site Analytics admin page with live visitor counter
30-second polling live visitor count with green pulse indicator
Time-grouped stats: Today, This Week, This Month, All Time
Top 10 most visited pages breakdown table
Silent anonymous visit tracking on all public pages
50,000 entry FIFO-capped stable storage for visit data
Admin CRM, Lead Pipeline, and Client Portal
Stripe payments, Google Calendar, Google Sheets sync
